items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 23: Nvidia Earnings Loom as Tariff Concerns Drive Dow 800 Points Lower
items.description: AI jitters, tariff shock, and looming Nvidia results have investors fleeing growth for perceived safety, today, Feb. 23, 2026.

items.title: Viral Research Post On AI Risks Spooks Investors. DoorDash, American Express Among Stocks Taking A Hit.
items.description: DoorDash stock slid after viral post described the food-delivery company as a "poster child" for risks from AI.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks As EU Makes Trump Tariff Move; IBM Dives On This AI Threat (Live Coverage)
items.description: Indexes, including the Dow Jones industrials, dived on the stock market today. The EU made a Trump tariff move. Novo stock slid but gold plays shined.

items.title: American Express Hits Dow Jones On AI Doomsday 'Work Of Fiction'
items.description: American Express dragged the Dow Jones Industrial Average lower on Monday afternoon as investors responded to a bleak 2027 AI-driven recession scenario published by Citrini Research, a firm that offers thematic and global macro trading ideas.  The firm says it's bullish on AI's potential and wonders about the economic implications if the impact is so far-reaching that it turns out to be bearish.  American Express, Capital One Financial, Blackstone Financial and KKR were among companies in Citrini's fictional write-up that were among Monday's biggest S&P 500 laggards.

items.title: Dow Jones Falls As Fictional AI White-Collar Wipeout Tale Strikes A Nerve
items.description: Dow Jones Falls As Fictional AI White-Collar Wipeout Tale Strikes A Nerve
